jsCode: (function() { function scrape() { try { const data = {}; const titles = document.querySelectorAll('h4'); titles.forEach(title => { const text = title.textContent.trim().toUpperCase(); if (text.includes('GOLD SPOT')) { const val = title.parentElement.querySelector('h5'); if (val) data.gold = val.textContent.trim(); } else if (text.includes('SILVER SPOT')) { const val = title.parentElement.querySelector('h5'); if (val) data.silver = val.textContent.trim(); } else if (text.includes('INR SPOT')) { const val = title.parentElement.querySelector('h5'); if (val) data.inr = val.textContent.trim(); } }); const mcxTitles = document.querySelectorAll('h3'); mcxTitles.forEach(title => { const text = title.textContent.trim().toUpperCase(); if (text.includes('24KT GOLD MCX')) { const row = title.closest('tr'); const val = row.querySelector('span.bgm:not([style*="display: none"])'); if (val) data.goldMcx = val.textContent.trim(); } else if (text.includes('999 SILVER MCX')) { const row = title.closest('tr'); const val = row.querySelector('span.bgm:not([style*="display: none"])'); if (val) data.silver999 = val.textContent.trim(); } }); const highLow = document.querySelectorAll('.main_h, .main_l'); if (highLow.length >= 6) { data.goldHigh = highLow[0].innerText; data.goldLow = highLow[1].innerText; data.silverHigh = highLow[2].innerText; data.silverLow = highLow[3].innerText; data.inrHigh = highLow[4].innerText; data.inrLow = highLow[5].innerText; } if (Object.keys(data).length > 0) { window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify(data)); } } catch (e) {} } scrape(); setInterval(scrape, 3000); })(); true;
